title: Request to have customised colours work for progress bar and workload widgets
excerpt: I would love to be able to customised the progress bar and the workload widget with our company colour palatte for our reporting. Now that we can do this for different chart types is awesome. These two areas are missing …

posts.author: Dumith (Dumith)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to be able to customised the progress bar and the workload widget with our company colour palatte for our reporting. Now that we can do this for different chart types is awesome. These two areas are missing this feature. Please vote to get this upgraded. Tx
